text:
Thanks, 

Re: comment 1, Hans is still under <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#staff-committers>, not yet in memoriam <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributors/#contrib-develinmemoriam>. 

Reopen?
